summary: Step 8: Compliance File Consolidation + Training Matrix Repair testing completed. All 18 backend tests passed. Frontend verification confirmed Training Matrix 5 stat cards, All Files tab with Library View badge, and document correction dropdown with 4 actions.
seed_data_creation: Used existing employee (d88335f6-1b18-435a-8086-28af4a583f77 - Olakunle Alonge) with uploaded documents for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Step 8 Compliance File Consolidation fully tested. Key features verified: (1) GET /api/training/matrix/summary returns 5 stat card counts (completed, verified, needs_renewal, expired, awaiting_extraction_review), (2) POST /api/documents/{id}/mark-uploaded-in-error requires min 10 char reason, (3) POST /api/documents/{id}/supersede marks document as superseded with optional replacement_document_id, (4) POST /api/documents/{id}/move-category requires new_requirement_id and min 5 char reason, (5) POST /api/documents/{id}/reopen-review requires min 10 char reason and admin role, (6) All Files tab renamed from Documents with 'Library View' badge, (7) Document dropdown shows 4 correction actions (Mark Uploaded in Error, Mark as Superseded, Move to Different Category, Reopen for Review).

training_matrix_summary_endpoint.details: GET /api/training/matrix/summary returns completed, verified, needs_renewal, expired, awaiting_extraction_review counts

training_matrix_5_stat_cards.details: Frontend Training Matrix page shows all 5 stat cards including Awaiting Review (Step 8 feature)

mark_uploaded_in_error_endpoint.details: POST /api/documents/{id}/mark-uploaded-in-error validates 10 char min reason, returns 404 for non-existent docs

supersede_document_endpoint.details: POST /api/documents/{id}/supersede accepts optional replacement_document_id, returns 404 for non-existent docs

move_category_endpoint.details: POST /api/documents/{id}/move-category validates 5 char min reason, requires new_requirement_id

reopen_review_endpoint.details: POST /api/documents/{id}/reopen-review validates 10 char min reason, requires admin role

all_files_tab_library_view_badge.details: All Files tab shows 'Library View' badge as per Step 8 requirements

document_correction_dropdown.details: Dropdown shows all 4 correction actions: Mark Uploaded in Error, Mark as Superseded, Move to Different Category, Reopen for Review
